items.name_en: LO℮w℮🌟 Soft Nappa Leather Flamenco Purse Bucket Bag. Features a ruffled design with key details like the signature knot on the side. The Bucket bag introduces a new size for daily use while retaining the series' graceful style. Stylish and versatile, it can be worn with the donut chain strap or slung over the shoulder with the leather strap. This version is made of soft Nappa leather. Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Removable and adjustable leather strap* Removable donut chain charm* Anagram embossed pebbled leather* Discreet magnetic closure* Suede lining, gold or silver foil stamping*(Matching metal chain extension leather shoulder strap)
items.name_cn:
LO℮w℮🌟 Soft Nappa Leather Flamenco Purse Bucket Bag. Features a ruffled design with key details like the signature knot on the side. The Bucket bag introduces a new size for daily use while retaining the series' graceful style. Stylish and versatile, it can be worn with the donut chain strap or slung over the shoulder with the leather strap. This version is made of soft Nappa leather. Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Removable and adjustable leather strap* Removable donut chain charm* Anagram embossed pebbled leather* Discreet magnetic closure* Suede lining, gold or silver foil stamping*(Matching metal chain extension leather shoulder strap)
Model: 012406
Size: 32*17*24CM

items.name_en: LO℮w℮🌟New Mini Amazona 23 Cropped Bag *Bowling bag 🎳 Latest size 🆕
items.name_cn:
LO℮w℮🌟New Mini Amazona 23 Cropped Bag *Bowling bag 🎳 Latest size 🆕
Born in the 1970s, the Amazona bag is reimagined in a long baguette proportion, continuing the iconic Amazona identity. This version is made of Nappa leather *Equipped with a small padlock as a new icon 🔒 to match the modern lifestyle where devices are often stored in the bag *And updated with dual zippers for convenient opening and closing *Tubular leather handle and retro corner details *Crossbody, Shoulder, or Handheld *Compact shape exudes a playful academic style.
Model: 062417
Size: 23*10*11CM

items.name_en: LO℮w℮🌟 Mini Soft Nappa Leather Flamenco Purse. Features a ruffled design with key details like the signature knot on the side. Stylish and versatile, it can be carried as a clutch, worn with the donut chain strap, or slung over the shoulder with the leather strap. This version is made of soft Nappa leather. Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Removable and adjustable leather strap* Removable donut chain charm* Anagram embossed pebbled leather* Discreet magnetic closure* Suede lining, gold or silver foil stamping*(Matching metal chain extension leather shoulder strap)

items.name_en: Flash sale! Brand new! No defects! No returns, no shipping. No box or packaging
items.name_cn:
Flash sale! Brand new! No defects! No returns, no shipping. No box or packaging
Large Irapala palm fiber and calfskin 🐂
basket handbag
Lots of celebrities have this
A traditional basket handbag
Features a classic hand-woven tubular calfskin strap and a calfskin 🐽🐽 embossed patch
This smaller size is made from Irapala palm, a palm tree grown, harvested, and sun-dried in Colombia, then woven by female artisans guided by fair trade principles at Corporación Oficio y Arte
Due to handcrafting, dimensions may vary slightly, making each purchase unique!
A summer essential woven bag. If you have to choose one bag for summer 👛, it must be a woven bag
Suitable for daily wear and weekend outings, instantly bringing the summer vibe
Anagram basket handbag. A classic hand-woven basket bag. Just throw it on for a vacation look ◇ A summer must-have
Size: 46cm~24cm~15cm
